012221211200201000111102202102001011012 - ASI: 25

Rules:
  01 = 0 * 1
  10 = 1 * 0
  20 = 2 * 0
  21 = 2 * 1
  011 = 01 * 1
  012 = 01 * 2
  020 = 0 * 20
  100 = 10 * 0
  102 = 10 * 2
  211 = 21 * 1
  0122 = 012 * 2
  1102 = 1 * 102
  2021 = 20 * 21
  02001 = 020 * 01
  20020 = 20 * 020
  21211 = 21 * 211
  011012 = 011 * 012
  100011 = 100 * 011
  11022021 = 1102 * 2021
  012221211 = 0122 * 21211
  02001011012 = 02001 * 011012
  20020100011 = 20020 * 100011
  1102202102001011012 = 11022021 * 02001011012
  01222121120020100011 = 012221211 * 20020100011
  012221211200201000111102202102001011012 = 01222121120020100011 * 1102202102001011012
